news.headline: Mason Capital Management-led group buys CB&I, a global leader in storage facilities, in all-cash equity deal. Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: CB&I, a leading designer and builder of storage facilities, tanks, and terminals for energy and industrial markets, has finalized an all-cash equity transaction on Dec. 9, 2024. The deal sets CB&I up for sustainable growth in the long term. Based in The Woodlands, Texas, the company specializes in creating storage solutions for various sectors. This transaction marks a significant step for CB&I as it continues to expand its operations.

news.headline: Dogecoin drops as Bitcoin dips below $100,000, causing large-scale liquidations in the crypto market.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin decreases as Bitcoin drops back under $100,000, causing significant long liquidations throughout the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Extreme introduces Extreme Platform ONE in N.C., integrating networking, security, and AI solutions for improved customer experience.
news.summary: Today in Morrisville, North Carolina, Extreme introduced Extreme Platform ONE™, an innovative technology platform that combines networking, security, and AI solutions. The platform promises seamless integration of these components for improved efficiency and performance.

news.headline: Recent buyback program shows significant transactions, boosting share value and investor confidence.
OpenAI challenges AI enthusiasts with $200 ChatGPT plan, testing limits of AI.
Global renal anemia treatment market worth $6.85B in 2024, set to reach $14.15B by 2034 with 7.5% CAGR growth.
news.summary: The global renal anemia treatment market is thriving, with a valuation of US$ 6.85 billion in 2024 and expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.5% through 2034. Renal anemia, a chronic condition commonly associated with chronic kidney disease, is primarily treated by enhancing red blood cell production using medications like epoetin. The market is benefiting from growing health consciousness globally, with manufacturers focusing on innovative strategies to capture a significant market share. Furthermore, the risk of renal anemia among pregnant women due to iron deficiency is projected to boost sales of new kidney anemia therapies. Iron supplements are estimated to hold a 17.1% market share in 2024, with the North American market expected to expand at a CAGR of 7.8% through 2034. East Asia is forecasted to account for 17.2% of the global market share by 2034.

news.headline: Global thermal cameras market valued at $3.1B in 2023, to grow at 7.5% CAGR, reaching $6.9B by 2034. Demand driven by tech advancements and diverse industry applications.
news.summary: The global thermal cameras market was valued at approximately US$3.1 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.5% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated US$6.9 billion by the end of the forecast period. Thermal cameras, utilizing infrared technology to detect and visualize heat emissions, have seen increased adoption across various industries due to advancements in technology. Industries such as oil & gas, HVAC maintenance, and military rescue operations have recognized the critical role of thermal cameras in ensuring safety and efficiency. Advancements in technology, including the integration of artificial intelligence and IoT, have expanded the capabilities of thermal cameras, allowing for real-time analytics and automated detection. These cameras are used in diverse applications such as leak detection in oil & gas plants, energy inefficiency identification in building diagnostics, and detecting faulty wiring in electrical inspections. Additionally, thermal cameras have played a crucial role in public safety during firefighting, rescue operations, and health screenings, particularly during the COVID-19 pandemic. Leading manufacturers are continuously innovating to enhance the functionalities of thermal cameras.

news.headline: CVS Health Corp. concludes cash tender offer for 4.100% Senior Notes due 2025; results announced.
news.summary: CVS Health Corporation, based in Woonsocket, Rhode Island, disclosed the outcomes of the cash tender offer known as the "Any and All Tender Offer" for its 4.100% Senior Notes due in 2025 (the "Any and All Notes"). This offer aimed to acquire any and all of these notes from investors. The initiative resulted in the acquisition of a substantial amount of notes by CVS Health. The company, listed as CVS on the NYSE, is pleased with the responses received.

news.headline: Wayfair Professional releases 2025 Design Trends, showcasing quirky joy to moody sophistication, shaping design landscape.
news.summary: Wayfair Professional recently unveiled the 2025 Design Trends, forecasting a shift in design styles from quirky joy to moody sophistication. Based on insights from the design industry, these trends are expected to dominate the landscape in the upcoming year. This announcement was made on December 9, 2024, in Boston, highlighting Wayfair's commitment as the go-to destination for home decor. The release showcases a transition towards more sophisticated and moodier design elements, reflecting changing consumer preferences. The insights provided in the 2025 Design Trends offer a glimpse into the evolving world of interior design, positioning Wayfair as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Women in HVACR receives largest endowment fund donation to support women in HVACR careers.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization, Women in HVACR (WHVACR), based in Englewood, Colorado, announced on December 9, 2024, that they have received donations aimed at supporting the career growth of women in the HVACR industry. WHVACR is dedicated to empowering women in heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration trades. These donations will be utilized as a resource to facilitate the advancement of women in this field.

news.headline: Chandler couple opens Caring Senior Service in Phoenix area to provide non-medical support for aging residents.
news.summary: New owners are introducing dedicated non-medical services to elderly residents aging in place in the Phoenix metropolitan area CHANDLER, Arizona. On December 9, 2024, Caring Senior Service, a company providing personalized home care services, revealed the launch of a branch in the region.

news.headline: Solu Therapeutics presents promising data on STX-0712 at ASH Annual Meeting for CMML and AML; Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Boston, Solu Therapeutics announced that STX-0712 demonstrated strong effectiveness against CCR2-positive monocytes in samples from patients with Chronic Myelomonocytic Leukemia (CMML) and Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML). The company, known for developing innovative treatments to target disease-causing cells in various medical fields, revealed promising results in their research. This study indicates the potential impact of STX-0712 in combating these types of cancer, highlighting its therapeutic significance.

news.headline: The Open Sea Institute featured in new book celebrating 120 years of Rolls-Royce luxury, highlighting prestige and history.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in London, the renowned luxury brand Rolls-Royce, known for its top-tier quality in automobiles, partnered with the International Club for Rolls-Royce and Bentley Enthusiasts (RREC), a prestigious car club.ояThe RREC, one of the oldest and most esteemed car clubs, is well-known for its exclusive membership and gatherings for enthusiasts of Rolls-Royce and Bentley vehicles. This collaboration highlights the shared dedication to excellence and luxury within the automotive industry.

news.headline: Barington Capital Group urges Macy's to boost shareholder value; recommends changes in capital allocation plan.
news.summary: In New York, Barington Capital Group, L.P. and Thor Equities LLC, along with their affiliates, announced their shareholder position in Macy's, Inc. (NYSE: M). They released a comprehensive presentation advocating for Macy's to revise its capital allocation approach and explore structural adjustments to boost shareholder value. This initiative comes as a response to the enduring obstacles faced by department stores and historical errors made by Macy's management.

news.headline: Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCQX:FLWBF) to attend ROTH Deer Valley Event from Dec 11-14, 2024, with CEO and CFO hosting meetings.
news.summary: Toronto-based company Flow Beverage Corp. (TSX:FLOW; OTCQX:FLWBF) has disclosed its intention to take part in the 13th Annual ROTH Deer Valley Event scheduled from December 11 to 14, 2024. The Founder and CEO, Nicholas Reichenbach, along with the CFO and EVP of Operations, Trent MacDonald, will be conducting investor meetings throughout the event. To arrange a meeting with Flow, interested parties can reach out to investors@flowhydration.com or oneononerequests@roth.com.

news.headline: Datadog plans to offer $775 million in Convertible Senior Notes to market for cloud applications.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Datadog, Inc. (Nasdaq: DDOG) revealed plans to offer $775 million in Convertible Bonds based on market conditions and other factors. Datadog is a leading monitoring and security platform for cloud applications.

news.headline: Apax Funds to sell minority stake in AssuredPartners to Arthur J. Gallagher & Co, finalizing deal in 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Apax Partners LLP revealed their decision to divest their minority position in AssuredPartners, a top global insurance company. This sale comes as part of a definitive agreement, marking a significant move for Apax. This decision will have a notable impact on both the companies involved and the industry as a whole.

news.headline: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics to provide corporate update on Dec 30, 2024; Key Opinion Leader Webinar on ALS on Dec 11, 2024. (NASDAQ: BCLI)
news.summary: A call has been scheduled for December 30, 2024, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. Furthermore, there will be a Key Opinion Leader Webinar discussing ALS advancements on December 11, 2024. This event is organized by BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: BCLI), a prominent developer of adult stem cell therapeutics based in New York.

news.headline: VersaBank transitions core team from Canadian to US opportunity - Dec. 9, 2024. Leader in digital banking and cybersecurity.  #VBNK
news.summary: In London, Ontario on December 9, 2024, VersaBank (TSX: VBNK) (NASDAQ: VBNK), a prominent player in digital business-to-business banking and cybersecurity technology solutions in North America, revealed changes in its executive team. This transition impacts key members responsible for steering the company towards success.

news.headline: Sunoco LP reveals 2025 operational and financial guidance. More details on Benzinga. #SUN #MizuhoConference.
news.summary: Sunoco LP (NYSE:SUN) revealed their projections for 2025, offering operational and financial guidance. Interested individuals can access the presentation materials outlining these forecasts on the company's website, www.sunocolp.com, specifically in the Investor Relations segment under Webcasts & Presentations.

news.headline: Orchestra BioMed to present AVIM Therapy Program at ICI Meeting in Tel Aviv, highlighting BACKBEAT global study and novel hypertension treatment for dual-chamber pacemaker patients.
news.summary: Orchestra BioMed announced two presentations at the 2024 Innovation in Cardiology Intervention meeting in Tel Aviv, Israel. The presentations will cover updates on the ongoing BACKBEAT global pivotal study and the unique mechanism of action of AVIM therapy for treating uncontrolled hypertension in patients needing a dual-chamber pacemaker. These presentations are part of a session on "Device-Based Hypertension Treatment" in the field of cardiology. Orchestra BioMed is a biomedical innovation company listed as Nasdaq: OBIO.

news.headline: Universe Pharmaceuticals INC in China announces $15M offering for 18.75M shares at $0.80 each in registered direct offering.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a pharmaceutical producer and distributor in Jiangxi, China, Universe Pharmaceuticals INC (Nasdaq: UPC), disclosed a crucial deal. They finalized an agreement with various investors to sell a total of 18,750,000 of the Company’s ordinary shares at a price of $0.80 each. This transaction, known as a registered direct offering, also includes pre-funded warrants at the same price as the shares but with an exercise price of $0.001 per share.

news.headline: CytoSorbents unveils rights offering exclusive to CTSO stockholders holding or buying by market close on December 13, 2024.
news.summary: CytoSorbents has disclosed a rights offering exclusively available to stockholders who currently hold or have purchased CTSO common stock by the market close on Friday, December 13, 2024. This offering will provide these eligible stockholders with the opportunity to purchase additional shares at a specified price within a specific timeframe. It is a beneficial opportunity for investors to increase their stake in the company and participate in its growth. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to its existing stockholders and aims to raise capital for future endeavors. Eligible stockholders should take note of the deadline and terms of the offering to make informed decisions regarding their investment in CTSO.

news.headline: Next Hydrogen received a Letter of Interest from Export Development Canada for up to $5M in debt financing after satisfying due diligence requirements.
news.summary: A company based in Mississauga, Ontario, called Next Hydrogen Solutions Inc. has recently revealed that Export Development Canada (EDC) has issued a Letter of Interest (LOI) to potentially provide up to $5 million in working capital debt financing. However, it is crucial to note that EDC's official commitment, along with the structure and terms of the financing, is subject to the successful completion of various due diligence assessments including technical, environmental, social and governance (ESG), financial, and commercial evaluations. Therefore, it is important to clarify that the LOI does not represent a finalized financing agreement at this stage.

news.headline: FDA designates SER-155 by Seres Therapeutics as Breakthrough Therapy for reducing bloodstream infections in allo-HSCT. 77% risk reduction shown in Phase 1b study.
news.summary: Due to promising Phase 1b clinical results, SER-155 has been granted designation. The data indicates a significant 77% relative risk reduction in bacterial bloodstream infections when compared to the placebo.

news.headline: Western Investment Company shifts focus to P&C insurance and investment management after completing announced transactions on August 30, 2024.
news.summary: On August 30, 2024, Western successfully finalized the transactions to transition its focus towards becoming a Property and Casualty (P&C) insurance and investment holding company. This strategic shift marks a significant change in Western's operations.

news.headline: Coherent to expand 150mm Indium Phosphide line with potential $33M funding, create 70 jobs at Sherman, Texas plant.
news.summary: A proposed funding of up to $33 million under the CHIPS Act has been suggested to aid in the expansion and modernization of Coherent's current facility in Sherman, Texas. This investment is projected to generate around 70 new job opportunities.

news.headline: InspireMD enrolls first patient in CGuardians II pivotal study of CGuard Prime Carotid Stent System for TCAR, enhancing physician and patient care.
news.summary: New research marks a significant advancement in the Company's goal to cater to a wide range of physician and patient requirements with top-notch CAS and TCAR solutions. The study showcases a major progression in their mission, aimed at meeting the needs of a diverse group of medical professionals and patients with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Cogent Biosciences reports 56% mean improvement in Total Symptom Score at 24 weeks for NonAdvanced Systemic Mastocytosis patients in SUMMIT trial; 76% see at least 50% reduction in TSS.
news.summary: At the 24-week mark, there was an encouraging 56% average enhancement in the Total Symptom Score (TSS), with an impressive 76% of individuals experiencing a minimum of a 50% decrease in TSS.

news.headline: FDA cleared Olema Oncology's IND application for OP-3136, a KAT6 inhibitor, targeting breast cancer. Nasdaq: OLMA.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. shared that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for OP-3136. This novel small molecule developed by Olema Oncology targets KAT6, an epigenetic factor frequently disrupted in breast cancer and various other cancer types. Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a Nasdaq-listed company focusing on creating and delivering precision therapies for breast cancer.

news.headline: Houston METRO awards NFI's MCI subsidiary contract for 100 D45 CRT commuter coaches, including 50 firm and 50 option units.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, NFI Group Inc. (NFI) revealed a recent deal with the Metro Transit Authority of Harris County (METRO) to acquire 100 MCI D45 CRT high-floor coaches. The contract, which consists of 50 confirmed coaches and 50 optional units, has been integrated into MCI's Q3 2024 firm and contingent awards. METRO decided to exercise the option for an additional 50 coaches in November, thereby raising the total confirmed quantity to 100 coaches. NFI Group Inc., known for being a top independent bus and coach manufacturer and a pioneer in zero-emission electric mass mobility solutions, operates under symbols TSX: NFI, OTC: NFYEF, and TSX: NFI.DB.

news.headline: Cemtrex's Advanced Industrial Services secures contracts worth $6.7 million from Derry Township Municipal Authority for biosolids management program.
news.summary: A project is backing an innovative biosolids management program that aims to produce sustainable fertilizer. This initiative is set to boost the production of environmentally friendly fertilizer from biosolids, achieving a significant increase in this process. The program plans to utilize cutting-edge techniques to convert a substantial amount of biosolids into fertilizer, providing a sustainable solution for agricultural needs. This project signifies a remarkable stride towards effective waste management and the development of eco-friendly agricultural practices.

news.headline: Kura Oncology and Kyowa Kirin report positive data on Ziftomenib: 100% CR rate in NPM1-m, 83% CR rate in KMT2A-r AML.
news.summary: Preliminary findings from the Phase 1a segment of the KOMET-007 study reveal a complete remission (CR) rate of 100% in NPM1-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) cases and an 83% CR rate in KMT2A-rearranged 1st-line adverse risk AML patients treated with the 7+3 protocol.

news.headline: Fractyl Health to present new preclinical data from Rejuva® single-administration GLP-1 pancreatic gene therapy platform at WCIRDC on Dec 12-14, 2024. Focus on treating obesity and T2D.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, on December 9, 2024, Fractyl Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GUTS) revealed plans to share fresh preclinical findings from its Rejuva platform at the 22nd World Congress Insulin Resistance, Diabetes & Cardiovascular Disease (WCIRDC) Poster Session on December 12-14, 2024. The Company, known for its focus on addressing the underlying causes of obesity and Type 2 Diabetes (T2D), aims to introduce innovative methods through this presentation.

news.headline: Corbus Pharmaceuticals begins first human study of CRB-601 to treat advanced solid tumors by blocking TGFβ.
news.summary: CRB-601 is a monoclonal antibody that targets αvβ8 integrin, aiming to inhibit the activation of latent TGFβ within the tumor micro-environment. This antibody is specifically engineered to interfere with the process that enables cancer cells to harness TGFβ for promoting tumor growth and metastasis. By targeting αvβ8, CRB-601 aims to disrupt this mechanism, potentially hindering cancer progression. This unique functionality makes CRB-601 a promising candidate for therapeutic intervention in cancers where TGFβ plays a crucial role.

news.headline: Gina Clausen Lozier named in 2024 Florida Trend Legal Elite NOTABLE Women Leaders in Law. #StPetersburg #Florida #LegalElite
news.summary: A notable woman, Gina Clausen Lozier, from St. Petersburg, Florida, was acknowledged in the 2024 Florida Trend Legal Elite NOTABLE Women Leaders in Law special section.

news.headline: Lomond Therapeutics reports successful results from Phase 1 studies of lonitoclax, a BCL-2 inhibitor, showing best-in-class selectivity.
news.summary: Lomond Therapeutics, a subsidiary of Eilean Therapeutics LLC specializing in precision oncology, revealed findings from their Phase 1 trials on the oral lonitoclax, administered once daily. The study focused on single ascending doses and showcased promising results. The announcement was made today in Dover, Del. on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: GTCR sells AssuredPartners to Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. for $13.45B after 13-year partnership, led by Jim Henderson.
news.summary: GTCR, a prominent private equity firm, revealed the completion of a successful 13-year partnership with AssuredPartners. This partnership, which initially started as a Leaders Strategy™ collaboration with insurance industry expert Jim Henderson, has culminated in a significant sale. The sale marks a milestone in this long-standing relationship and highlights the fruitful outcomes achieved over the years. The announcement was made in Chicago on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Riot Platforms plans to offer $500 million in convertible senior notes due 2030, as per announcement.
news.summary: Castle Rock, Colorado - On December 9, 2024, Riot Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: RIOT) revealed plans to offer $500 million in convertible senior notes due 2030, dependent on market conditions and related factors. The Company, also known as Riot, made this announcement.

news.headline: Startup World Cup 2025 at CES Las Vegas offers $1M investment prize debut on Jan. 9, 2025 at Paris Hotel.
news.summary: In an exciting announcement, the Startup World Cup will mark its debut at CES 2025 in Las Vegas on January 9, 2025. Entrepreneurs and innovators are invited to the Paris Hotel in Las Vegas, NV, for this global competition aimed at providing startups with a platform for international exposure. This event promises to be a key opportunity for startups to gain global recognition and network with industry experts.

news.headline: Lodging Dynamics names Lisa Carlson as COO, a hospitality veteran with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In Provo, Utah on December 9, 2024, the Lodging Dynamics Hospitality Group (Lodging Dynamics) revealed the selection of Lisa Carlson as their latest Chief Operating Officer (COO). Bringing over 30 years of leadership experience in the hospitality sector, Lisa's appointment signifies a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: Movement Network Foundation launches Movement Mainnet Beta & $MOVE Token Generation Event in Cayman Islands on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Grand Cayman, the Movement Network Foundation revealed the release of Movement Labs' Movement Mainnet Beta and Token. The Foundation aims to promote innovation and accelerate the utilization of MoveVM technology. The launch signifies a major milestone for the organization.

news.headline: Metalla appoints Chris Beer to board of directors. TSXV: MTA NYSE: MTA. Effective immediately. Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - On December 9, 2024, Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd. (TSXV: MTA, NYSE American: MTA) welcomed Chris Beer to their board of directors. The appointment is effective immediately, reinforcing the Company's leadership as it continues its operations on both the Toronto Stock Exchange Venture (TSXV) and the New York Stock Exchange American (NYSE American).

news.headline: VersaBank's Q4 & fiscal 2024 results show strong business model as bank launches RPP in US market; Annual report available online.
news.summary: The Consolidated Financial Statements and Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) for VersaBank's fiscal year 2024 will be accessible on the company's website at www.versabank.com/investor-relations. Investors can also find this information on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and on EDGAR at www.sec.gov/edgar.shtml. Additionally, supplementary financial details will be available for review.

news.headline: VersaBank (TSX: VBNK) declares CAD $0.025 per share dividend for quarter ending Jan 31, 2025. Payable on Jan 31, 2025.
news.summary: London, Ontario - VersaBank revealed today that they have declared cash dividends of CAD $0.025 per Common Share for the quarter ending January 31, 2025. This announcement impacts shareholders holding shares of the Bank, listed as VBNK on the Toronto Stock Exchange and NASDAQ. The dividend will be payable on January 31, 2025.

news.headline: Hamilton Lane named 'Best Place to Work in Money Management' for 13th year by Pensions & Investments.
news.summary: Hamilton Lane, a top private markets investment management firm based in CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., received industry awards showcasing their innovation and leadership in private markets. On Dec. 9, 2024, the firm, listed on Nasdaq as HLNE, was recognized as a "Best Place to Work." This achievement reflects their dedication to excellence in the sector.

news.headline: Siyata Mobile's Bluetooth Remote Speaker Mic gains sales momentum with Major Android and iOS device compatibility. (Character count: 100)
news.summary: Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA), a leading global developer and vendor of Push-to-Talk over Cellular (PoC) handsets and accessories, has announced expanded market opportunities with its compatibility now covering major Android and iOS devices. This development, revealed in Vancouver, BC on Dec. 9, 2024, signifies a pivotal move for the company to capitalize on a wider consumer base.

news.headline: McDermott sells CB&I storage business to investors led by Mason Capital Management. Deal completed on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, McDermott International, Ltd (McDermott) finalized the sale of its CB&I storage business to a group of financial investors headed by Mason Capital Management. The agreement, which was initially announced on October 7, 2024, has now been successfully concluded.

news.headline: Chorus One partners with Northstake, strengthening ETH validator marketplace. Increased security and institutional confidence.
news.summary: Northstake A/S from Copenhagen, Denmark, has revealed a new partnership with Chorus One, a blockchain node infrastructure provider. This collaboration is aimed at enhancing institutional trust in Northstake’s solution by offering secure, scalable, and compliant infrastructure. The development was announced on December 9, 2024. The partnership is significant as it brings together two leading entities in the blockchain space and is expected to have a positive impact on the industry.

news.headline: Sunoco LP reveals 2025 operational & financial guidance, NYSE: SUN stock info. Details at www.sunocolp.com.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Sunoco LP (NYSE: SUN) shared its projected operational and financial outlook for the year 2025. Interested parties can access the details on the company's official website, www.sunocolp.com, under Investor Relations.
